nombre: Baya Voce | Relationship Repair Expert | Columbia University
bio:
If you want a healthy relationship, repair is non-negotiable. I help you learn how.
Supervision w/ Esther Perel
Couples Research @columbia @maps__org
descripcion:
Here’s what nobody tells you about “relationship goals”: the magic isn’t in never breaking. It’s in how beautifully you rebuild. ✨

You can tell everything about a couple not by watching them at brunch, but by watching what happens when someone messes up. Do they retreat into separate corners or find their way back to each other’s humanity? ❤️

The couples who make it aren’t the ones who never disconnect. They’re the ones who’ve learned that disconnection is just the comma, not the period. Real intimacy lives in the aftermath when someone says “I was wrong” and actually means it. When you can be pissed off without making it dangerous. 

It’s a fools game to romanticize the highlight reel. The measure of love isn’t in the absence of mess, it’s in your willingness to clean it up together. Again and again. Without keeping score. 

#relationships #love #connection

nombre: Baya Voce | Relationship Repair Expert | Columbia University
bio:
If you want a healthy relationship, repair is non-negotiable. I help you learn how.
Supervision w/ Esther Perel
Couples Research @columbia @maps__org
descripcion:
What breaks a relationship is bringing something painful to someone and watching them turn it into a debate about whether you’re right to feel it.

You can love a person completely and still not be able to build anything with them if they can’t let your pain land.

#relationships #attachmentstyle #emotionalintelligence

nombre: Baya Voce | Relationship Repair Expert | Columbia University
bio:
If you want a healthy relationship, repair is non-negotiable. I help you learn how.
Supervision w/ Esther Perel
Couples Research @columbia @maps__org
descripcion:
Comment EFFORT for a free pdf teaching you what to do in this scenario. 
.
One of you is pushing for change, the other is holding space for what already feels okay. This isn’t incompatibility, it’s a common rhythm many couples get stuck in.

One partner feels alone in the effort to grow, the other feels pressured just for being themselves. It’s not about who’s right or wrong, but about seeing how different ways of loving show up.

If you’re the one chasing progress, try noticing the value in what’s already here without mistaking it for being stuck.

If you’re the one content with the now, take a small step toward curiosity and ask questions before the tension builds.

This dynamic isn’t a problem, it’s a chance to learn how to love across difference instead of push against it.

#relationships #growth #connection

nombre: Baya Voce | Relationship Repair Expert | Columbia University
bio:

descripcion:
There are people who love each other deeply and still can’t make it work. The question is whether you’re actually reaching each other  and whether what you have is worth mourning what you won’t.

Most couples just keep trying to communicate their way out of a decision.

#relationships #couplestherapy #selfawareness

nombre: Baya Voce | Relationship Repair Expert | Columbia University
bio:
If you want a healthy relationship, repair is non-negotiable. I help you learn how.
Supervision w/ Esther Perel
Couples Research @columbia @maps__org
descripcion:
The moment you stop trying to fix your partner is the moment your relationship actually starts working.

Here’s what actually shifts everything: learning to see your partner’s resistance as information, not defiance.

The couples who last aren’t the ones who never trigger each other. They’re the ones who got curious about what lives underneath the trigger instead of trying to eliminate it. They learned that your partner’s “”flaws”” are usually their survival strategies.

Your nervous system wants safety, but your soul wants growth. The magic happens when you can hold both without making your partner responsible for either.

#relationships #love #growth

nombre: Baya Voce | Relationship Repair Expert | Columbia University
bio:
If you want a healthy relationship, repair is non-negotiable. I help you learn how.
Supervision w/ Esther Perel
Couples Research @columbia @maps__org
descripcion:
Being with someone who carries trauma means learning to navigate layers of experience that aren’t yours.

Their reactions are shaped by histories long before you, and your own patterns can add complexity to the dance.

True love in this context isn’t about fixing or rescuing, it’s about staying present, noticing triggers without judgment, and practicing repair that’s patient, clear, and grounded.

Here are 3 powerful questions to ask when their trauma gets activated:
1️⃣ What did this bring up in you?
2️⃣ What did this remind you of?
3️⃣ What do you need to feel safe again?

It’s asking these questions, holding space without losing yourself, and discerning between care and over-functioning. Healing happens individually, but connection deepens when both people approach it with awareness and integrity.

#relationships #healing #emotionalawareness

nombre: Baya Voce | Relationship Repair Expert | Columbia University

Plenty of relationships end between two people who genuinely loved each other because love showed up alone, without everything else it needs to survive in the same house as another human being. 

Losing someone sometimes just means there was more to learn.

Credits to @jayshettypodcast and semnozpyltl on TikTok.

nombre: Hipnoterapia | Odczyt energetyczny
descripcion:
Ten film na tik toku poszedł w viral, jestem bardzo ciekawa jak zostanie przyjęty tutaj. 

I do wszystkich nadętych panów którzy zaraz będą miałczeć w komentarzach. 

Tak to Wy macie być mężczyznami. 
Tak to Wy macie zapraszać nas na randki. 
Tak to Wy macie za nami chodzić i wychodzić. 
Tak to Wy macie potrafić i chcieć zmienić swoje zachowanie jeżeli jest krzywdzące. 
Tak to Wy jesteście silniejsi fizycznie więc macie nieść więcej. 
To my kobiety ryzykujemy większą stratą emocjonalną , finansową , fizyczną i zdrowotną wchodząc w związek / relacje - dlatego mamy czuć się bezpieczne. 
Wszystkie kobiety, które do mnie przychodzą na hipnozę czy odczyty to kobiety straumatyzowane mężczyznami którzy umieli tylko biernie czerpać a nie dawać w zamian. 

Jeżeli musze to w ogóle tłumaczyć i mówić na głos, to zastanówcie się jaki jest poziom waszej dojrzałości emocjonalnej. 

A teraz panie. 
Jeżeli nie pisze - to nie chce. 
Jeżeli się nie angażuje to nie chce. 
Jeżeli nie zmienia swojego zachowania, które jest krzywdzące wobec Ciebie - to nie chce. 
Jeżeli nie rozmawia z Tobą o przyszłości - to znaczy, że nie chce. 
A jeżeli mówi Ci, że Cię kocha to kocha tylko wygodę bycia przy Tobie, a nie faktycznie Ciebie. 
Przestań mu tłumaczyć jak ma się zachowywać wobec Ciebie. 
Po prostu przestań. 

Buziak.  #relationships#kobietyimężczyźni#love#rozwojosobistykobiet

nombre: 𝕃𝕚𝕟𝕠𝕪 𝔼𝕝𝕚𝕪𝕒𝕙𝕦 ♡
descripcion:
Bodybuilding isn’t a solo sport❤️

Bodybuilding is often seen as a solo sport but what people don’t see is everything that happens behind the scenes.
The early mornings, exhaustion, sacrifices no one talks about.

What looks like one person on stage is really a team, a circle of support and a shared dreams.

This sport isn’t easy and it’s definitely not for everyone
But for those who are built for it, it becomes a way of life.

Behind every athlete you see, there’s a story of close people who believed in them when no one else was watching.

It’s not normal and easy to be a girlfriend/ fiancé or wife of a bodybuilder but I do it from my bottom of my heart with true passion and love, healthy relationship with support and love without any terms this is how it should be❤️

@dannygoldbody ❤️🏆

#love #bodybuilding #relationships
